title: Callista hymenantha
intro: There is limited information available on the plant Callista hymenantha.
taxonomy: Callista hymenantha is classified within the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Neogastropoda. It belongs to the family Columbellidae, a group of small to medium-sized sea snails. The genus Callista is part of this family, characterized by their elongated shells with a rounded aperture. These sea snails are marine gastropod mollusks, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. They are known for their ability to live in a variety of habitats, from shallow tide pools to deeper waters.

properties: Callista hymenantha, also known as the pink fairy orchid, has been studied for its potential therapeutic properties.
